ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match type */,
  "cross_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cross type */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost set */,
  "b_cost" REAL /* Baseline cost associated with the match */,
  "v_cost" REAL /* Variable cost associated with the match */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the match for prioritization */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the match was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the match was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES cost_sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_cross_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cross_type_id") REFERENCES cross_types ("cross_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_type_id") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type (e.g., verde_addition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the match type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the match type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cross_types" (
  "cross_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross type */,
  "cross_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cross type (e.g., not, with_equal_cost) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cross type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cross type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cross type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cross_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set (e.g., baseline) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the plant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the plant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the plant was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the plant (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant where the process is conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the process was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the process was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the process (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_process" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_histories" (
  "cost_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost history entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "b_cost" REAL /* Baseline cost at the time of the entry */,
  "v_cost" REAL /* Variable cost at the time of the entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the cost entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cost history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cost history entry was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the cost entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_histories_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_histories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., plant manager, engineer, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_plant" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_process" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the match */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was last updated */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_files_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the match */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_versions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., efficiency, throughput) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., efficiency, throughput) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_metrics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
